tasks.title: Validate distributed lock and leader-election TTLs to avoid non-expiring keys
evidence: internal/distributed/redis_lock.go:37-47 uses ttl directly in SetNX without validation
internal/distributed/redis_lock.go:277-283 uses ttl directly in SetNX for leader election
plan: Add ttl > 0 validation for RedisLock.Acquire/Renew and RedisLeaderElection.Elect/RenewLeadership using apperrors.Validation
Update or add tests that cover ttl <= 0 behavior and ensure errors are classified correctly
Confirm call sites pass explicit TTL values and update any docs/usage notes

tasks.title: Handle crypto/rand.Read failures when generating Redis lock tokens
plan: Change generateToken to return (string, error) and handle rand.Read failure
Propagate failures from RedisLock.Acquire with apperrors.Internal and add tests for the error path
Ensure token generation failure does not attempt to acquire a lock

tasks.title: Replace RedisRegistry ListWorkers KEYS usage with SCAN to avoid blocking
plan: Replace KEYS with SCAN iteration and a reasonable COUNT batch size
Preserve current behavior for expired workers and error handling
Add tests covering multiple scan batches and context cancellation

tasks.title: Fix NewRedisRegistry return type (avoid pointer-to-interface)
plan: Change NewRedisRegistry to return Registry (or *RedisRegistry) instead of *Registry
Update any call sites and compile-time interface assertions
Add/adjust tests to exercise the constructor path

tasks.title: Wrap RedisRegistry Register/Unregister errors with apperrors
plan: Wrap Redis client errors with apperrors.Wrap(KindInternal, ...) and safe messages
Add tests asserting error kind classification and safe messages
Verify logging uses apperrors.SafeMessage where relevant

tasks.title: Standardize HTTPFetcher errors on apperrors for consistency
evidence: internal/fetch/http_fetcher.go:58-75 returns errors.New/ fmt.Errorf instead of apperrors
internal/fetch/http_fetcher.go:115-130 returns fmt.Errorf for proxy errors
plan: Replace errors.New/fmt.Errorf with apperrors.Validation/Internal and safe messages
Update tests to assert on apperrors kinds and safe messages instead of raw strings
Review other HTTPFetcher error paths (size limit, session lookup) for consistency
